titleStmt.title: SII 36.139: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 139. (A.R. No. 139 of 1910.) TEṈKARAI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURA DISTRICT. On a pillar in the gōpura of the Mūlasthāṉēśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete and mutilated. The beginning portion of the inscription is lost. It contains portions of historical introduction of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayamaṭantaiyum
nalañciṟappak ko
ḷārnta ciṉap
puliyuṅ ko
ṭuñ cilaiyuṅ
kulaintoḷi
ppa vāḷārnta po
ṟ kiri mel varikkaya
lkaḷ viḷaiyāṭa I
ruṅkaṭal valaiyakatti
ṉitaṟam peruka karuṅ
kali kaṭintu ceṅko
l naṭappa Orukuṭai
niḻaliru nilaṅ kuḷira
mūvakait tamiḻu muṟai
maiyil viḷaṅka nā
l vakai vetamu navi
ṉṟuṭaṉ vaḷara Aiva
kai veḻviyuñ ce
y viṉaiyiyaṟṟa Aṟu
vakaic camaiyamuma
ḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa Eḻuva
kaip pāṭalumiyaluṭaṉ
parava Eṇṭicaiyaḷa
vuñ cakkarañ cellak
koṅkaṇar kaliṅkar
kocalar māḷuvar ciṅ
kaḷar teliṅkar ciṉa
r kuccarar pallavar maka
tar vikkalar cempiyar
pallavar mutaliya pārt- (few lines missing)
ra mārviṉiṟ poliya
p paṉimalart tāma
rait ticaimukaṉ pa
ṭaitta maṉuneṟi
taḻaippa maṇimu
ṭicūṭip poṉ
ṉi cūṇāṭṭup pu
li yāṇai poyakala
k kaṉṉi cūṇāṭṭiṟ ka
yalāṇai kai vaḷara
veñciṉa vivuḷiyum
veḻamum parappit tañ
caiyu muṟantaiyuñ
centaḻal koḷut
tik kāviyu nilamu muniṉ
ṟu kaviṉiḻappa vāvi
yu māṟu maṇi nīr nala
ṉuḻittuk kūṭamu mā
matiluṅ kopuramumā
ṭaraṅkum māṭamāḷi
kaiyu maṇṭapamum pa
laviṭittu toḻutu va
ntaṭaiyā nirupar tan
tokaiyar Aḻuta ka
ṇṇīrāṟu parappik ka
ḻutai koṇṭuḻutu ka
vuṭi viccic cempiyaṉai
c ciṉamiriyap porutu
curampuka voṭṭik
pam poṉ maṇi muṭi pa
ṟittup pāṇaṉukkuk
koṭuttaruḷip pāṭaruñ- (few lines missing)
ṭuttu mīḷun taṟu kaṇ
matayāṉai mel ko
ṇṭu nīrāḻi vaiy
ya muḻutum po
tu voḻitta kū
rāḻiyuñ cey
ya toḷume
koṇṭupoy Aiy
yappaṭāta Arumaṟai
terantaṇar vāḻ tey
vap puliyūrt tiruve
llaiyuḷ pukkup po
ṉṉampalam poli
ya vāṭuvār pūvaiyu
ṭaṉ maṉṉun tirume
ṉi kaṇṭu maṉaṅkaḷi
ttuk kola(m)malar
melayaṉuṅ kuḷirtūḻā
y mālumaṟiyā malar
cevaṭi vaṇaṅki vāṅku
ciṟai yaṉṉan tuyilo
ḻiya vaṇṭeḻuppum
pūṅkamala vāvi cūḻ po
ṉṉamarāpatiyil Ot
tulakun tāṅku muyar
meruvaik kuṇantu
vaittaṉaiya coti maṇi
maṇṭapattiruntu co
lai mali paḻaṉac coṇā
ṭu tāṉiḻanta mālai muṭi
yun tara varuka veṉṟaḻai
ppa vāṉ nilai kulaiyavar (few lines missing)
vemmaiyelāṅ
kaiyakalat tāṉota
kam paṇṇit ta
ṇṭār muṭiyu
ṭaṉe viṭṭa
pukaliṭanta
ṉ mārave
ḷaik kutti kīḻ Iṭṭa
paṭik keṉṟitu piṭipā
ṭāka veṉap poṅku
nīr ñālattup pūpālar
toḷa viḷaṅkac ceṅka
yal koṇṭu ṉaṟunti
rumukamum paṇṭiḻanta
cōḷapatiyeṉṉu nā
mamun toṉṉakaru mīḷa
vaḻaṅki viṭai koṭut
tuviṭṭaruḷi vākaika
tirvel vaṭa venta
rtam pātamekattaṉaiya
ciya vīrakkaḻalaṇintu
viḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi vīra
simhāsaṉattu vaḷaṅ
keḻu kavari Irumaruṅkacai
ppak kaṭaleṉa muḻaṅku
ṅ kaḷi nalliyāṇai vaṭapu
la ventar maṇippuyam pi
riyā Ilaṅkuḻai Arivai
yar toḻutu niṉṟetta
Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāro
ṭu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrī ko
māṟapaṉmarāṉa trihuvaṉa
Digital edition of SII 36.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
